name: mobx-react-form-docs
description: MobX React Form Documentation — powered by VitePress

scripts.docs:publish: vitepress build && cd _book && rm -rf .git && git init && git checkout --orphan gh-pages && git add . && git commit -m 'update book' && git push git@github.com:foxhound87/mobx-react-form.git gh-pages --force
